subject: FCAU Health Certificate application received — {{.userform.exporter_name}}
body:
Dear {{.userform.exporter_name}},

Your FCAU Health Certificate application for the consignment to {{.userform.consignee_name}} has been received and is now under review. We will notify you of the outcome.

Thank you.
